name: parkktech
description: Parkk Tech plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: shrinkage
plugins.description: Shrinkage — write less, better code: token-lean codemaps, reuse-first extension ladder, provably-safe reduction. An LSP reference oracle and runtime deprecation probes turn 'looks unused' into proof before deletion. /srk:map, /srk:gate, /srk:audit, /srk:shave, /srk:coverage.
